morning_brief.preview:
# EverPass Morning Brief — Wednesday, May 13, 2026

Generated: 2026-05-13 05:17 ET | Auto-pipeline STALE 7+ days | NLM frozen at W19 (2026-05-04)

---

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. NESN Plaehn Deadline — TODAY (2026-05-13): Response to April 12 clean term sheet v7 due today
   (Peter Plaehn / Goldwyn Harper, 5-business-day window). No overnight confirmation. MG mechanics
   (3.25x flat vs. escalator) and Gate 3 blockers unresolved. Escalate directly if no response by EOD.

2. Samsung CTV — T-7 Days, UNSIGNED (launch 2026-05-20): Separate Agreement unsigned. Option B
   draft ready. NLM W19 shows nothing new from Samsung. Send Option B today to Annie O'Brien
   (a1.obrien@samsung.com), CC Chi Tung. No margin.

3. Charter Exhibit A+B Overdue — Post-Launch-Call Follow-Up: Exhibit A overdue since April 15
   (28 days), Exhibit B overdue since May 1 (12 days). Yesterday's 3pm ET EverPass 2026/2027 Launch
   call (Ligocki/Holden/80+ Charter staff) outcome not yet captured. Charter Hospitality/F&B
   deadline is May 15 (2 days). Confirm call outcome and path forward on both exhibits today.

4. TWDC Cole Silent 6+ Days — Disney CP Blocker CLEARED: Danielle McIntosh Track A/B direction
   was due April 16 (27 days overdue). Cole silent. CRITICAL POSITIVE: W19 NLM confirms Disney
   content protection blocker CLEARED — 720p/L3 (Widevine L3/FairPlay/PlayReady) accepted; FCO +
   hardware dual-auth deemed compliant per Section 10 April 13 draft. Largest technical threat to
   deal eliminated. Re-engage Cole immediately with this resolution.

5. DIRECTV — SymphonyAI Audit Lapsed (May 1 Deadline +12 Days): SymphonyAI file access demand
   had May 1 deadline; no DTV response confirmed. Kelley Drye (Brianna Santolli) follow-up required.
   Net claim $2,634,239.50. DTV dealers still spreading misinformation per W19 NLM. Board Go/No-Go
   on filing complaint remains open.

---

## Active Deal Status

Partner          | State                  | Next Action                              | Deadline
Samsung CTV      | UNSIGNED T-7           | Send Option B to Annie O'Brien           | TODAY / 5/20
NESN             | Awaiting Plaehn reply  | Escalate if silent EOD                   | TODAY
Charter          | Launch call done 5/12  | Confirm Exhibit A+B; F&B tiers due 5/15  | 5/15

deals.next_action: (Active, Distribution): Counter expected 5/6-5/9 (Holden 5/5 ETA). NBA scope reply drafted, awaiting Ryan's send. Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13. Fire Stick joint sales alignment needed before 5/21 STVA launch.
(Exploratory): Catch up rescheduled 5/5 to 5/7 10:30 (Gardiner). CONFLICT with Mediacom Discussion same slot 5/7 10:30. Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+ scoping. Pre-commercial.
(Live): Bi-weekly integration 5/6 11:00 AM (Hegeman + cross-team). F1 Miami GP delivered 5/3. Watch IMAX expansion risk to MLS Season Pass and MLB Friday Night Baseball.
(Active, FAST): McCormack offering Fri 5/8 9:00-10:30 PT or 12:30-1:30 PT. Reply today. Executable draft 11 days overdue. Two-track deal: Weather API + 24/7 FAST channel; targeting late-May launch.
(Active, RSN): Plaehn 2nd chase 5/5 17:08Z. Respond within today or tomorrow. Term sheet v7 in NESN court since 4/12.
(Near Close, RSN): DocuSign 4/29 (Bernheimer); 5/1 follow-up. Ryan owes signature. July 2026 launch.
(Closed): NWSL amendment fully executed 2026-05-02 via DocuSign. Monitoring only.
(Legal Route Only): Legal + PR posture only per 5/5 directive. No commercial response. Rack rates NOT to be quoted.
(Active, Content): Altman 5/5 outbound on schedule. McIntosh Track A/B direction still overdue. EVO pricing gap and DAI impression share blank still open.

(Active, Content): Upfront 5/11 streaming. NBA confirmed NOT in commercial grant per 5/5 verification. Side letter or amendment required for any NBA commercial offering. CRITICAL mortality risk; term expires 2027-07-31 (~15 mo).
(Near Close, CTV): CTV launch 5/20 (14 days). Separate Agreement drafted, NOT executed. Without signature Samsung standard terms apply. Legal close needed this week.
(Active, RSN): Feneque 4/29 inbound on Exhibit B device multiplier discussion (3 fix options). Catch up next week.

items.text: Fully Executed Commercial Premises License in Place — EverPass and Amazon Content Services LLC have a fully executed Commercial Premises License Agreement covering TNF on Prime Video (NFL), NBA games (60+ regular season plus postseason), NASCAR Cup Series rac…

EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…

Standalone CHSN Economics Are Loss-Making at Base-Case Attach Rates — Financial modeling (April 12, 2026 extraction) shows that at a 4% standalone attach rate, CHSN generates only 78 subscribers and a -$39,264 gross loss in FY27; the CHSN content fee of $49.6…

Co-Sell Pipeline Active — Chili's Identified as Priority Target — Charter (Spectrum) covers an estimated 84-85% of Chili's locations nationwide; EverPass and Charter discussed a joint pitch at approximately $1,400 per unit using Xumo Stream Box hardware with…

Amendment No. 1 Adds Comcast Sales Channel and Buy-Through Requirement — Amendment No. 1 (draft, April 3, 2026) significantly expands the original August 27, 2025 Referral Agreement: adds Comcast Sales as a direct sales/billing agent channel for all EverPass…

Active Legal Dispute — Audit Demand Letter Issued April 16 — EverPass issued a formal demand letter on April 16, 2026 invoking audit rights for the 2024-2025 NFL Season and declaring the 2023-2024 audit closed; DIRECTV owes an undisputed balance of $1,512,351…

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Rate card is flagged as still under review — Schedule 1 carries a note that per-subscriber fees are "subject to Schedule 1 Section under the term sheet [Rate Card Under Review/Parties to Discuss]" and final rates are to be confirmed at execution; the current…

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

Economics Gap: Zero-Fee vs. Paid-Per-Sub — EverPass proposes zero license fee with ad pass-through as consideration; Scripps Term Sheet requires paid per-sub fees at a rate card not yet provided. Neither side has moved and no counterpart economic draft exists.
